requirement: No future observations, labels, targets, or test outcomes may enter the temporal interface.
The mechanism must be represented as CRA internal state or PyNN/SpiNNaker-compatible microcircuit/state variables, not as an unclaimed host-side adapter.
Report and match feature count, hidden/state count, readout parameters, and update budget against all strong controls.
Do not combine morphology variability, lifecycle changes, replay changes, or hardware/native changes into this gate.
The design must be compatible with later PyNN/SpiNNaker or custom-runtime mapping, but this tier remains software evidence only.
Even a scoring pass must route to promotion/compact regression before baseline freeze.
